query: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing, capital raise, cash position and going concern status in 2026. Has the company raised significant capital or secured funding in Q2 2026 (April-June 2026)? What is their current cash runway?
answer:
I've completed the research on Virgin Galactic's (SPCE) financing, cash position, and going concern status in 2026.

## Key Findings

**Yes, Virgin Galactic raised significant capital in Q2 2026 (April–June):**

1. **~$52M ATM equity raise (April 2026)** — the largest single equity raise of the period
2. **June 10, 2026 debt-for-equity swap** — $30.5M of First Lien Notes converted to 6.73M shares
3. **June 29, 2026 debt-for-equity swap** — $52.479M of 2027 Convertible Notes converted to 17.35M shares/warrants (a ~75% reduction of that note series)

**Cash position (as of March 31, 2026, most recent balance sheet):**
- ~$251M total liquidity ($124.8M cash + $95.1M marketable securities)

**Cash runway / burn:**
- Q1 2026 free cash flow: –$93.3M; Q2 2026 guidance: –$87M to –$92M
- At ~$90M/quarter burn against ~$251M liquidity, plus ongoing ATM issuance, third-party analysis (Simply Wall St) flagged **less than one year of cash runway** at the reporting date

**Going concern:**
- No explicit going-concern warning in the Q1 2026 earnings release (May 14, 2026). Management framed it as the "final quarters of our pre-revenue phase," with commercial spaceflight targeted for Q4 2026.

**Trade-off:** The financing extended runway and eliminated near-term debt (no principal now due until March 2028) but at the cost of heavy dilution — diluted shares more than doubled YoY (35.4M → 79.5M) and kept rising. The stock traded at $2.62 on July 9, 2026, down ~70% from its 52-week high.

The structured findings have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool with full data points and sources.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic (NYSE: SPCE) narrows Q1 loss and guides 2026 free cash flow (8-K)
sources.snippet: Cash and cash equivalents $124.8M; marketable securities $95.1M; total liquidity ~$251M; Q1 2026 FCF -$93.3M; Q2 guidance -$87M to -$92M; April 2026 ~$52M ATM proceeds; ~$87M ATM capacity remaining.

sources.title: SPCE Stock Jumps As Virgin Galactic Extends Cash Runway
sources.snippet: Completed a $30.5M debt-for-equity swap issuing ~6.73M new shares, retiring part of 9.80% first-lien notes and pushing maturity to 2028.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Completes Debt-For-Equity Swap - SPCE Stock Slips After-Hours
sources.snippet: June 10, 2026: redeemed $30.5M of notes by issuing 6.73M shares; ~$172M First Lien Notes remain, no principal due until March 2028.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic (NYSE: SPCE) swaps $52,479,000 of 2027 notes for equity (8-K/A)
sources.snippet: June 29, 2026: swapped $52.479M of 2.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2027 for 17,350,341 shares/pre-funded warrants; 2027 notes reduced from $70.4M to ~$17.9M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Reshapes Finances And Governance Ahead Of 2026 Commercial Flights
sources.snippet: Less than 1 year of cash runway as of reporting date; converted ~$30.5M of 9.80% First Lien Notes to equity; filed $46.9M shelf registration; track record of substantial dilution.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
sources.snippet: May 14, 2026 Q1 2026 results; flight test on track Q3 2026; first spaceflight Q4 2026.

sources.snippet: Quarterly report for period ended March 31, 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Soars: SPCE Doubles - Will the Rally Last in 2026?
sources.snippet: SPCE closed June 1, 2026 at $7.52, up 125% in five sessions after Q1 beat and reports of a new strategic investor.
